meaning: n.来源,水源,消息来源,原始资料,发起者 源,源极
examples: What is their main source of income?
Success in sport is a source of national pride.
Plants are the ultimate source of all foodstuffs.
Still, the mostly Republican-backed solution has been a source of contention and confusion in the Senate.
In the past, the documentary category has been the Academy s biggest source of grievance.
